stocks.impact_theory: Trump's announcement of pausing strikes on Iranian power plants for 5 days following productive US-Iran talks led to a sharp unwind of the geopolitical risk premium. Oil prices plunged over 10% (WTI below $90), reversing prior gains from war fears over Strait of Hormuz. Economic implications: lower energy costs boost consumers but hurt producers' margins. Market psychology: relief rally in equities, panic selling in energy. Historical parallels: similar to 2019 US-Iran de-escalation after Soleimani strike. Analogies: deflating a balloon (war hype burst) or rug-pull in crypto (hype reversal).

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Oil plunge directly hits XOM's upstream revenues; X sentiment shows unwind of longs, web news confirms energy sector leading losers post-announcement.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Avoid; potential further downside if talks progress (-2-5% more)
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Opportunity for 3-6% gains short-term; cover if escalation resumes
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Talks fail, oil rebounds sharply; broader market rotation away from energy.

stocks.justification: Clear causal link from news to price action, high volume confirms sentiment shift.

stocks.impact_theory: Same de-escalation event crushed oil prices, shifting sentiment from bullish (war premium) to bearish for integrated majors. Implications: reduced refining margins, capex cuts possible. Psychology: FOMO longs reversed to capitulation. Parallels: 2022 Ukraine de-tension moments. Analogies: wave crashing after buildup; popped champagne expectations.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Mirrors XOM; web searches show energy leading declines, X posts highlight oil longs exiting.

potential_profit_risks.short_position: Target 4-7% downside; high reward if oil stays low
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: OPEC cuts, renewed tensions; dividend supports floor.

stocks.justification: Consistent with sector move, strong news correlation.

stocks.impact_theory: Lower oil prices reduce jet fuel costs (30-40% of expenses), boosting margins amid de-escalation relief. Implications: improved profitability, capacity growth. Psychology: risk-on shift favors cyclicals. Parallels: post-2020 COVID oil crash rally. Analogies: tailwind for flight; weight lifted off wings.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Airlines surge on cheap fuel; X chatter on risk unwind favors transports, news confirms sector leadership.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: 3-8% upside potential as oil stabilizes low
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Demand weakness, recession fears; fuel hedge limits upside.

stocks.justification: Strong logical link but airlines volatile on other factors.

stocks.impact_theory: Identical to DAL: fuel cost relief from oil crash post-Trump pause. Implications: earnings upgrade potential. Psychology: broad market rally amplifies. Parallels: 2016 oil glut. Analogies: cheaper gas for road trip; sunny skies ahead.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Sector rotation into transports; sentiment from X shows unwind benefiting consumers.

stocks.impact_theory: De-escalation reduces near-term defense spending urgency, though backlog intact. Implications: delayed contracts. Psychology: risk-off unwind hits 'war trades'. Parallels: post-Cold War 1990s dips. Analogies: storm passing without rain; sword back in sheath.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Defense lags rally; X/web note rotation out of safe-havens.

stocks.justification: Less direct impact than energy; other factors at play.
